title: All you need: Mace PVP
description: this lightweight modpacks, offers all the necessary mods and resource packs you need to become the best possible, this modpack contains only the minimum for balance between lag and optimality
body:
##  ⚔️ All you need: Mace PVP 
– Lightweight & Competitive

Mace PvP is a lightweight, performance-optimized modpack designed for players who want to master mace combat and climb the mace tier efficiently.

Every mod included serves a clear purpose:
giving real in-game advantages, improving combat responsiveness, and keeping the experience fast, stable, and lag-free — even in intense PvP scenarios.

###  **🔥 Key Features**

Optimized for performance – minimal overhead, high FPS, smooth gameplay

Combat-focused – mechanics and tweaks that enhance mace PvP effectiveness

Lightweight & functional – no unnecessary mods, only what gives value

Skill-rewarding – perfect for players aiming to push their mace tier higher

Server-friendly – ideal for competitive environments and practice worlds

###  **🎯 For who?**
### 
Players grinding mace tiers

Competitive PvP players who want every advantage

Low-end or high-end PCs looking for maximum performance

Anyone who prefers clean, focused modpacks over bloated ones

If your goal is to fight smarter, hit harder, and progress faster with the mace, this modpack is built for you.


ENJOY!!!!!!!!!!!!!
